codigo_empleado.description: Employee code extracted from the CSV header block

dias_no_laborados.description: Non-worked days (Ausencias value from summary row)

horas_extras_simples.description: Simple overtime hours as decimal (0.5 precision), computed from minutes via floor(minutes/30)/2

horas_extras_dobles.description: Double overtime hours as decimal (0.5 precision), computed from minutes via floor(minutes/30)/2

numero_de_quincena.description: Pay period within the month — 1 (first half) or 2 (second half), supplied by user

mes.description: Month number derived from summary row date

anio.description: Year derived from summary row date
